steps.title: Name a country
steps.content: The student wants an example of a country that uses "dinar" in the name of its currency. The notes give a specific country and currency: Bahrain's currency is the Bahraini dinar.

steps.title: Avoid general or unrelated facts
steps.content: B is a negative statement about a Latin word, not an example. C says several countries use the term but names no country. D gives the origin of the word instead of a current currency example. The sentence must identify Bahrain and its dinar. The answer is A.
